plugins.name: new-project
plugins.description: Scaffold a brand-new project from a reusable framework template: copies the bundled template, git-inits, optionally creates a GitHub repo, then interviews to fill in CLAUDE.md and draft a Phase 1 roadmap.

plugins.name: workstream
plugins.description: Run multiple features in parallel safely: start-stream + finish-stream manage worktrees, STATUS.md, WORKSTREAMS.md, and the merge/cleanup lifecycle.
